base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_mode_arena — a ui from 1988 super mario bros 3. 2-Player Battle Mode mini-game — top-down arena with Mario vs Luigi. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
